name: Bausch & Lomb Corp
summary: PART I Bausch + Lomb Corporation (and its subsidiaries) (Bausch + Lomb, we, us, our or theCompany) is dedicated to protecting and enhancing the gift of sight for millions of people around the world from the moment of birth through every phase of life. Our mission is simple, yet powerful: helping you see better, to live better.
